title: OREGON WARMLINE / LINEA DE ESPERANZA - 211info
text: HEPPNER BEHAVIORAL HEALTH OREGON WARMLINE / LINEA DE ESPERANZA Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a telephone peer support service. Trained peers have both mental health and addiction recovery experience to emotionally support callers. All calls are confidential. 550 West Sperry Street Heppner, OR 97836 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 698-2392 .. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Warmline (800) 698-2392 Sharon Bliss [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. To request a callback, confirm the phone number, and a peer will usually respond within 5-55 minutes. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Talklines/Warmlines Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COUNTY CRISIS LINE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - DRUG AND ALCOHOL TREATMENT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
